_meta.note: Reference seed data. ASRS is the integration layer: it composes the World boundary, the Model (PWMS), the Self Model (PSMS), and the Policy System (PPS) into one coherent self-representation.

external.label: Environment
external.description: The region of state the agent perceives and acts upon — entities, events, other agents, and resources, observed through a time-ordered stream of discrete events.

internal.label: Internal Environment
internal.description: The agent's own stateful substrate — memory, finite resources, beliefs, current commitments, and capabilities. Bounded, depletable, renewable; the reservoir the loop manages.

model.label: Model
model.description: Typed ontology of the external world — what *can be* the case out there. The schema the Situation Model instantiates as a current state estimate.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: An individual agent the self interacts with.

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: A collective actor with coordinated behaviour.

entity_types.name: Project
entity_types.description: A bounded initiative producing an output.

entity_types.name: Resource
entity_types.description: A finite, depletable asset (time, money, energy).

entity_types.name: Obligation
entity_types.description: A standing external requirement or commitment.

relation_types.name: part-of
relation_types.description: A is a component of B.

relation_types.name: integrates-with
relation_types.description: A and B are technically coupled.

event_types.name: occurrence
event_types.description: An independent happening (a message arrives, a deadline passes).

event_types.name: outcome
event_types.description: A consequence of the agent's own action — the feedback signal.

event_types.name: trigger
event_types.description: A time- or condition-based prompt (alarms, scheduled commitments).

event_types.name: observational
event_types.description: A reading the agent actively takes.

self.label: Self Model
self.description: Typed model of the agent — what the agent *is, has, and holds*. The structural facets against which internal state is recorded and regulated.

identity.name: The Autoregia operator
identity.narrative: An engineer building a personal viable system model — converting implicit routines into explicit, steerable structures.

beliefs.subject: productivity
beliefs.claim: Deep work blocks beat fragmented hours for engineering output.

beliefs.subject: rest
beliefs.claim: Sleep below 7h measurably degrades next-day decisions.

constraints.name: One system at a time
constraints.rule: Ship one sub-system before starting the next.

policy.label: Policy System
policy.description: Normative layer — what the agent *ought to do and be*. Writes its decisions into the Self Model as identity / constraint / commitment facets.

charter.purpose: Preserve and extend agency by engineering the self as an explicit, viable control system.
